string.text: Doc, I'm dying. I need major surgery, immediately. (Surgery Cost is determined by wound severity)
Let me look... God, what a mess. This is going to cost you. Do you have the money?
I have the money. Do it.
I can't afford it right now...
Lie back and bite down on this. You're going to sleep for a while.
Then I suggest you write your will, Stalker. Come back when you can pay.
